title: Collection of Changes
description: A mod that adds random things to vanilla
body:
Collection of Changes is a mod that as the name implies adds in a collection of random things to Minecraft. The mods main aim is adding more equipment to Minecraft however it also adds in new bulding and utility blocks. This mod requires the latest version of geckolib for forge 1.20.1.


<details>
<summary>Additions</summary>

<details>
<summary>Ender Gems</summary>
Ender stone is a new ore found in the outer end islands. It generates similar to iron and gives levitation 1 for 2 seconds when stepped on.
  
![an image of a purple ore inside of the end dimesion](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ca8e82aad7886ee8c2ab64b84d7973eb18b02a8a.jpeg)

It can be mined with a diamond pickaxe to get ender gems.


![A Circular Purple Gem Called An Ender Gem](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5621a1d08f93ea443251fd9ed13013e87376db50_0.webp)

Ender gems can be used to craft ender blocks which give levitation 5 for 3 seconds when stepped on, and brewing levitation potions in a brewing stand
</details>


<details>
<summary>Void Wood</summary>
New trees called Void Trees spawn in the end dimension
  
![A purple tree inside of the end dimension](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d0363f51344234391bd7e9b899d78a6c606528f1.jpeg)

They can be mined to get void wood (a new purple wood type) and their leaves which always drop (making them great blocks for bridging) and don't let light go through them (allowing you to use them to hide valuables in plain sight)

![A purple wood set](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/eddde39e7d1c415cc63b38ee21b21087138adaff.jpeg)

</details>


<details>
<summary>Endersent</summary>
The Endersent is a new boss that is meant to be fought around iron/diamond tier. Firstly you will need to kill Endermen until you get void essence from them, them you will craft a void portal as such.

![A recipe showing an enderpearl surrounded by void essence in the cardinal directions giving a void portal](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2802b6574b6ceab18796fb26d716f303508bf939.jpeg)

The boss will try to get close to you and then slam its fists down at you dealing 4 hearts of damage and giving you the effect void toched (if not playing on easy), which makes defense be ignored by all damage and stops all healing while the effect is active.

When attacked an Endersent has a 20% chance to teleport away and summon Watchlings near the entity that attacked it. Watchlings are a new mob found in the end dimesion which get aggressive if you get close to them, on dificulties higher than easy they have a chance to spawn with the ability to give void touched to what they attack.

![An endermen like being with many eyes called a watchling](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9acccf16eed218d3ceb593a8da2a213fc4ed2d7d.jpeg)

Upon defeat an Endersent will always drop an eye of ender, along with the chance of droping void essence, unstable enderpearls, endepearls and one of 3 weapons or a void amulet.
</details>


<details>
<summary>End Upgrades</summary>
Using Ender Gems and Void Essence you can craft an End Upgrade Template as such

![A crafting table recipe showing a netherite upgrade template in the middle, shulker shells in the corners, void essence in the top on bottom middle, and endergems in the left and right middle giving a new upgrade template](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c8d5a2d5ec40a4ae7579aad3cb1edfb2379cf17f.jpeg)

This can be used to upgrade a netherite chestplate and helmet into a shulker chestplate and helmet along with upgrading Void Touched Blades and Backstabber into The Beginning of The End and Swift Striker respectively, both of these weapons are dropped by the Endersent.

![An armor stand wearing shulker themed armor](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/27e45605d9bdfbf9aee9cda660e0cef6daf21295.png)

</details>


<details>
<summary>Everything else</summary>
The wither drops a new item called a Wither Tablet it gives you Wither II for one second and a Withers Blessing II for 1.5 seconds (this effect gives the same level of wither as it to whatever the entity it attacked was)

Unstable enderpearls can be dropped by Endermen, Watchlings and Endersents. It can be right clicked to teleport the user at the cost of damage and getting void touched for 20 seconds.

Tridents are now craftable using 3 Prismarine Shards, Prismarine Crystal and a diamond

Warden Head dropped by warden (can be worn and is purely decorative)

![The Head of a warden on the floor made of deepslate bricks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dfa5b01700b8ca060706c43fd6488b421bd53cff.png)

</details>
</details>
